productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Alaris Grey Shoe
description: Perfect for overpronators, the nike Air Alaris+ 4 MSL running shoe offers outstanding stability, supportive Fit and a comfortable ride. The Air Alaris has a soft, shock absorbing crach pad at the heel that reduces the rate of pronation and offers optimum stability during long runs. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.Upper Breathable sandwisch mesh upper for ample ventilation Durable TPU frame to lock the foot in place and keep it stable Synthetic overlays for added shoe structure, durability and comfort Cushioned collar for comfortable feel Lace-up system for a snug fit Meshed and padded tongue and EVA sockliner for in-step comfort Midsole Phylon midsole with full-length Nike Air unit in the heel for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning, soft responsive shock absorption and superior fit Soft crash pad in the heel for impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Environmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durability BRS 1000 Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistance Modified waffle lugs for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioning Plastic trusstic shank in the midfoot arch for an ergonomic fit Flex grooves for enhanced flexibility offering a more natural stride Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
